name: Mandu Tuikim (Korean Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cabbage and onion until cooked through.
2. Grind finely.
3. Squeeze out moisture using cheese cloth.
4. Mix with remaining ingredients, up to wonton skins.
5. Open wonton package one at a time, wet two edges with egg white.
6. Place filling mixture onto center.
7. Fold into triangle and seal, ensuring no air remains inside.
8. Drop triangles into boiling water until they float.
9. Leave in boiling water for 1 minute, then remove immediately.
10. Dry on tray until skin is no longer sticky to the touch (both sides).
11. Pan fry triangles in vegetable oil until brown and crisp.
12. Serve hot with dipping sauce.
Dipping Sauce:
- Mix equal parts Kikoman Soya Sauce, Vinegar, and Sake.
